headline: Federal Realty (FRT) Acquires Congressional North Center for $72.3M in Maryland
summary: Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) is included among the 14 Quality Stocks with Highest Dividends. On March 16, Federal Realty Investment Trust (NYSE:FRT) announced the acquisition of the Congressional North Shopping Center in Montgomery County, Maryland, for $72.3 million. The property sits immediately next to Federal’s Congressional Plaza. It is a grocery-anchored center with about […]
